title: Tidal Commission
description: A configurable commission board mod with task cards, timed delivery, player-created commissions, and datapack support.
body:
# Tidal Commission / 潮汐委托

Tidal Commission adds a commission board system to Minecraft.

Players can open the commission board, reveal task cards, accept timed delivery tasks, submit the requested items, and receive rewards after completion.

Each commission has its own source, difficulty, required items, rewards, and time limit. Players need to decide whether a commission is worth accepting before spending resources and taking the risk.

The mod is built around short-term decisions: reveal, accept, complete, abandon, or wait for cooldowns. It can be used as a lightweight task system for survival worlds, servers, and modpacks.

## Features

- Commission board gameplay
- Multiple commission slots
- Timed delivery tasks
- Different commission sources
- Task difficulty tiers
- Item submission and reward claiming
- Abandon penalties and completion cooldowns
- Player-created commissions
- Datapack-based task expansion
